Dear Ms. Johnson,

Thank you for contacting our support team. I have processed the cancellation of your order #12345 as requested. A full refund of $49.99 will be issued to your original payment method within 3-5 business days.

Please don't hesitate to reach out if you have any further questions.

Best regards,
Customer Support

Hi there,

Your order has been cancelled and you'll receive a refund of $49.99 in 3-5 days.

Thanks,
Support Team

Dear Mr. Smith,

I'm pleased to confirm that your flight has been rebooked to April 15, 2026 in business class for 2 passengers. Your new booking reference is BK-001.

If you need anything else, please let me know.

Kind regards,
Airline Support
